concept: Make me a platformer game with a buggy car with the ability to jump and fly. The player has to evade fire and bombs by jumping over them. There are enemy cars guarding the power-ups. The player can also collect power-ups to gain special abilities and throw water at the fire and shoot the cars. The game has multiple levels. Please have multiple sub goals which lead to a final goal. The player should be able to make progress in the game by collecting items and power-ups.
